header.description: Convert data from and to XML

mode.description: From and to what format the data should be converted

jsonToxml.description: Converts data from JSON to XML

xmlToJson.description: Converts data from XML to JSON

xmlNotice.displayName: If your XML is inside a binary file, use the 'Extract from File' node to convert it to text first

dataPropertyName.description: Name of the property which contains the XML data to convert

allowSurrogateChars.description: Whether to allow using characters from the Unicode surrogate blocks

attrkey.description: Prefix that is used to access the attributes

cdata.description: Whether to wrap text nodes in <![CDATA[ ... ]]> instead of escaping when necessary. Does not add <![CDATA[ ... ]]> if it is not required.

charkey.description: Prefix that is used to access the character content

headless.description: Whether to omit the XML header

rootName.description: Root element name to be used

explicitArray.description: Whether to always put child nodes in an array if true; otherwise an array is created only if there is more than one

explicitRoot.description: Whether to set this if you want to get the root node in the resulting object

ignoreAttrs.description: Whether to ignore all XML attributes and only create text nodes

mergeAttrs.description: Whether to merge attributes and child elements as properties of the parent, instead of keying attributes off a child attribute object. This option is ignored if ignoreAttrs is true.

normalize.description: Whether to trim whitespaces inside text nodes

normalizeTags.description: Whether to normalize all tag names to lowercase

trim.description: Whether to trim the whitespace at the beginning and end of text nodes
